the mpon confirms the invoice with payment advice

model: mspo sends the measurement bill to the go
mspo sends the bill for additional readings to the go

user_text:
The process begins with a starting point where a decision is made to follow one of two main paths. In the first path, the process involves sending various types of bills to the Grid Operator (GO). The options include the Metering Point Operations Organization (MPOO) sending a bill for metering point operations, the Metering Service Provider Organization (MSPO) sending a bill for measurement services, the MSPO sending a bill for additional readings, or the MPOO sending a bill for equipment acquisition. Each of these actions leads to the GO examining the received bill.

Once the GO examines the bill, another decision is made. The GO can either reject the invoice or confirm it with a payment advice. Regardless of the decision, the process then converges back to the main decision point.

In the second path, the MPOO sends a bill for equipment acquisition to the Metering Point Operator Network (MPON). The MPON then examines the bill. Following this examination, the MPON can either confirm the invoice with a payment advice or reject it. After this decision, the process also converges back to the main decision point.

Finally, after all possible actions and decisions have been made, the process concludes at an endpoint.
output_text:
The process begins with a starting point where two parallel paths are initiated simultaneously. 

In the first path, a decision is made among four possible actions. The first option involves the Metering Point Operations Organization (MPOO) sending a bill for metering point operations to the Grid Operator (GO). The second option involves the Metering Service Provider Organization (MSPO) sending a bill for measurement services to the GO. The third option is for the MSPO to send a bill for additional readings to the GO. The fourth option involves the MPOO sending a bill for equipment acquisition to the GO. After any of these actions, the GO examines the received bill.

Following the examination, the GO makes a decision. If the GO rejects the invoice, the process continues with the rejection of the invoice. Alternatively, if the GO confirms the invoice, it is accompanied by a payment advice. After either confirming or rejecting the invoice, this path concludes and synchronizes with the other parallel path.

In the second parallel path, the MPOO sends a bill for equipment acquisition to the Metering Point Operator Network (MPON). The MPON then examines the bill. Based on this examination, the MPON decides whether to confirm or reject the invoice. If the MPON confirms the invoice, it is done with payment advice. If the MPON rejects the invoice, the process continues with the rejection. After either confirming or rejecting the invoice, this path also concludes.

Finally, both parallel paths converge, and the process comes to an end.
